query:
SELECT 
  id, sport, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate,
  awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal,
  awayML, homeML,
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE id = 2250006
